texto: I think that’s what we are all meant to do, all we can do, with the gifts we have been given, be they experiences or talents. Those gifts are waiting to be used to touch others’ lives, as we patiently listen for and obediently follow the direction to which God is calling us. Because that’s what you do with gifts, you give them away.
explicacao: Citação de Ryan J. Pemberton sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “I think that’s what we are all meant to do, all we can do, with the gifts we have been given, be …” articula reflexao, calling, gifts em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como gifts.
